meta.title: Could 6th Gen Fighters come with FOLDING TAILS?
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

Big thanks to Rodrigo Avella for the use of his incredible artwork in our thumbnail! Make sure to go support him on his website: https://rodrigoavella.com/

A week or so ago, popular military content creator Habitual Line Crosser posted a question on Twitter that touches on the very latest in stealth technology: Would it be possible to design a stealth aircraft with retractable standing vertical tail surfaces? 

Let's dive into this and see what we can find out.
